name: Legal Nurse Consultants
tagline: LNCC-certified legal nurse consultants, independently rated.
description: The most comprehensive directory of LNCC- and CLNC-credentialed legal nurse consultants offering medical record review, litigation support, and expert witness services across the United States.
certifications: CLNC (Certified Legal Nurse Consultant - Vickie Milazzo Institute)
CPHRM (Certified Professional in Healthcare Risk Management)
cityPagePromptContext:
Legal nurse consultants (LNCs) are registered nurses who apply clinical expertise to legal proceedings.
Credentialed professionals (LNCC, CLNC) review medical records, identify deviations from the standard of care, locate and screen expert witnesses, and prepare litigation support materials for attorneys and insurers. Law firms retain them for medical malpractice, personal injury, workers' compensation, and product liability matters; insurance companies use them for claims review and coverage analysis. LNCs may also serve as testifying expert witnesses or develop certified life care plans that quantify long-term care costs for damages calculations.
buyerSearchContext: when building a medical malpractice case, evaluating personal injury claims, or needing a life care plan for damages calculations

editorialAuthor.name: Nick Palmer
editorialAuthor.title: Founder & Lead Researcher
editorialAuthor.bio: Nick built this directory to help plaintiff attorneys and insurers find credentialed legal nurse consultants without sifting through generalist consultants who lack the clinical depth for complex litigation — a frustration he encountered when researching medical expert resources for a personal injury case.

schema.label: LNCC Certified (AALNC)
schema.scrape_hint: Look for "LNCC" credential after name, AALNC membership badge, or explicit statement of LNCC certification on homepage, about page, or credentials section.

schema.label: Years of Experience
schema.scrape_hint: Extract from 'About Us', team bios, or '20+ years in legal nursing' statements; calculate from founding year if business start date is provided.

schema.label: Legal Practice Areas Served
schema.scrape_hint: Parse services menu, case type pages, or client descriptions; match keywords like 'malpractice', 'personal injury', 'workers comp', 'product liability', 'defense firm', or 'mass tort'.

schema.label: Available as Testifying Expert Witness
schema.scrape_hint: Check for mentions of 'expert witness', 'testifying expert', 'deposition experience', or 'trial testimony' in services or bio sections.

schema.label: Certified Life Care Planner
schema.scrape_hint: Look for CNLCP credential, 'life care plan', 'future medical cost analysis', or 'catastrophic injury planning' in services or credentials.

schema.label: Report Turnaround Time
schema.scrape_hint: Extract from service descriptions, FAQs, or 'What to Expect' sections; look for phrases like 'report within 10 business days' or 'rush review available'.

schema.label: Services Offered
schema.scrape_hint: Parse services menu or homepage offerings; match keywords like 'record review', 'standard of care', 'expert referral', 'life care plan', 'MSA', or 'deposition prep'.

schema.label: Phone Number
schema.scrape_hint: Extract from header, footer, contact page, or click-to-call buttons; normalize to standard format (e.g., (555) 123-4567).

schema.label: Website
schema.scrape_hint: Capture primary domain from browser address bar, homepage links, or business listings; ensure full URL with https:// protocol.
